title: [MTR4] Trampack Redux
body:
Trams for MTR4

MTR4 only. MTR3 is unsupported.

This pack featues such trams as:

  • Modertrans Moderus Beta MF 15 AC

More trams will be added in the future.

This is a public version of Trampack Redux pack. Any use of private version outside of GeoRail or Newtown servers is unauthorized and will be prosecuted.
